골로새서 4:1.content: Masters, give to your servants that which is just and equal, knowing that you also have a Master in heaven.

골로새서 4:2.content: Continue steadfastly in prayer, watching in it with thanksgiving,

골로새서 4:3.content: praying together for us also, that God may open to us a door for the word, to speak the mystery of Christ, for which I am also in bonds,

골로새서 4:4.content: that I may reveal it as I ought to speak.

골로새서 4:5.content: Walk in wisdom toward those who are outside, redeeming the time.

골로새서 4:6.content: Let your speech always be with grace, seasoned with salt, that you may know how you ought to answer each one.

골로새서 4:7.content: All my affairs will be made known to you by Tychicus, the beloved brother, faithful servant, and fellow bondservant in the Lord.

골로새서 4:8.content: I am sending him to you for this very purpose, that he may know your circumstances and comfort your hearts,

골로새서 4:9.content: together with Onesimus, the faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you. They will make known to you everything that is going on here.

골로새서 4:10.content: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, greets you, and Mark, the cousin of Barnabas (concerning whom you received commandments, “if he comes to you, receive him”),

골로새서 4:11.content: and Jesus who is called Justus. These are my only fellow workers for God’s Kingdom who are of the circumcision, men who have been a comfort to me.

골로새서 4:12.content: Epaphras, who is one of you, a servant of Christ, salutes you, always striving for you in his prayers, that you may stand perfect and complete in all the will of God.

골로새서 4:13.content: For I testify about him that he has great zeal for you, and for those in Laodicea, and for those in Hierapolis.

골로새서 4:14.content: Luke the beloved physician and Demas greet you.

골로새서 4:15.content: Greet the brothers who are in Laodicea, and Nymphas, and the assembly that is in his house.

골로새서 4:16.content: When this letter has been read among you, cause it to be read also in the assembly of the Laodiceans, and that you also read the letter from Laodicea.

골로새서 4:17.content: Tell Archippus, “Take heed to the ministry which you have received in the Lord, that you fulfill it.”

골로새서 4:18.content: The salutation of me, Paul, with my own hand: remember my bonds. Grace be with you. Amen.
